description: Thyroid Cancer Recurrence prediction model. Flexible schema - accepts any clinical thyroid parameters.

fields.note: ThyroidRequest accepts extra fields (model_config = ConfigDict(extra='allow')). Pass any available thyroid clinical markers.

extraction_example.raw_text: Thyroid Oncology Report. Patient: 65-year-old Female. Tumor Size: 5.0 cm (large). Histology: Anaplastic Carcinoma (aggressive). TNM Stage: IV with distant metastasis. Lymph Node Involvement: Yes (N1b - bilateral). Distant Metastasis: Yes (M1 - lung involvement). Prior RAI Therapy: 200 mCi. TSH suppression protocol active. Prognosis: Poor with anticipated rapid progression.
